name: arj
title: arj
description:
archiver for .arj files
This package is an open source version of the arj archiver. This version
has been created with the intent to preserve maximum compatibility and
retain the feature set of original ARJ archiver as provided by
ARJ Software, Inc.

arguments.description: tractor will accept the appended line as its command line.
arguments.raw: -ex  tractor will accept the appended line as its command line.

commands.name: rearj
commands.description: Converts other archive formats to .arj files

command_examples: arj  command  [-switch[-|+|option]] archive[.arj] [base directory] [!list name|path name|wild-
arj a archive ... dir1 dir2 dir3
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use arj because archiver for .arj files.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use arj as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `arj  command  [-switch[-|+|option]] archive[.arj] [base directory] [!list name|path name|wild-` as documented upstream for arj.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `arj a -e archive *` as documented upstream for arj.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `arj a archive name1 name2` as documented upstream for arj.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `arj a -jt archive *` as documented upstream for arj.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair arj with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `arj --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

arguments.name: -ex
arguments.description: tractor will accept the appended line as its command line.

examples: arj  command  [-switch[-|+|option]] archive[.arj] [base directory] [!list name|path name|wild-
arj a archive ... dir1 dir2 dir3
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install arj. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `arj  command  [-switch[-|+|option]] archive[.arj] [base directory] [!list name|path name|wild-`. Further invocations from upstream: `arj a -e archive *`; `arj a -jt archive *`.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: archiver for .arj files.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: archiver for .arj files.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install arj
Install with: sudo apt install arj
